calendar.matters:
HEARING ON DAMION SIMS' PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-03-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES: his matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Petitioner's request for Change of Name.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:44 am and concluding at 10:48 am.

Petitioner Damion Simis not appearing.

The Clerk took attendance at 9:00 am and an individual Identified themselfe as Damion Simis.

The Court had recieved information that Damion Simis had an outstanding warrent for his arrest and contacted the San Francisco Sheriff's Department.

The Sheriffs department detained the individual claiming to be Damion Simis but later identified the individual as Ivan Colbert.

Mr. Colbert informed the Sheriff's deputies that Mr. Simis had paid Mr. Colbert to attend the hearing in order to avoid capture by law enforcement.

The Court DENIES the request and dismisses the petition With prejudice. (D505)
